description: The Sureños are a Mexican-American street gang alliance originating in Southern California, founded in 1967. They are loosely organized with hundreds of individual gangs under the Sureño umbrella, primarily active in the southwestern United States and expanding to other regions. Their roots trace back to a prison rivalry between the Mexican Mafia and Nuestra Familia. They are involved in drug trafficking, murder, and organized crime, and maintain alliances with Mexican drug cartels.

country_links.evidence_quote: También se pueden encontrar en algunas partes de México. Los sureños también mantienen relaciones con varias organizaciones narcotraficantes con base en México.
country_links.context: The Sureños are present in parts of Mexico and maintain relationships with Mexican drug trafficking organizations.

country_links.evidence_quote: En España suelen encontrarse en sucursales como Madrid , Valencia , Barcelona , Huesca , Burgos , Murcia , Alicante y Tarragona , donde hay aproximadamente un centenar de socios activos.
country_links.context: The Sureños have active chapters in multiple Spanish cities.
